cards.back: A sequence of numbers (0-3) representing the direction of neighboring pixels in an image, used for boundary detection.
A technique used to trace the boundary of an object in an image, where the algorithm follows the chain code to determine the shape of the object.
A chain code representing a horizontal pixel, used to trace the boundary of an object.
A chain code representing a vertical pixel, used to trace the boundary of an object.
A chain code representing a 45-degree pixel, used to trace the boundary of an object.
A chain code representing a 135-degree pixel, used to trace the boundary of an object.
